message:
style(pager): reformat long chained fold expression for readability

Break the single-line db_size computation (page1[28..32] fold) across
multiple lines.  The fold was exceeding the project's line-length
convention and was hard to parse at a glance.  No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
